sections.paragraph:
verb ללבן

to discuss, clarify; heat (metal)

verb לובן (>>לֻבַּן)

be discussed, clarified; heated (metal)

verb להתלבן

be discussed, clarified

verb להלבין

to turn white; make white, whiten, bleach

verb הולבן

be whitened

verb ללבן (>>ליבן)

to discuss, clarify; heat (metal)

adjective

white, lily, pale, pallid, hoary, marmoreal, paleface

masculine noun

sour milk, koumiss, kumiss, kumys, kumyss
